Bug / Task Description: k_core_decomposition assigns coreness values that are too low: nodes in a 2-core report coreness 1, and k_shell / k_core_subgraph / degeneracy derived from it are all shifted by one. The defect is in the condition deciding when a surviving neighbor's residual degree should be decremented as a node is peeled.
Commit Subject: fix(decomposition): use correct degree threshold when peeling k-core neighbors
